calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-23-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: 10:23AM
Judge Diane Wick, clerk-Beth Wilber, reporter-brenda fields: c/c for jury trial. Mr. Rossoff appears for plaintiff, No appearance by George Harold, defendant in Pro Per. Case proceeds as a prove-up without defendant. Mr. Rossoff calls 1st witness Crystal Ivy, and begins direct examination. Mr. Rossoff submits exhibit 1, the original rental agreement;and exhibit 2, the 3 day notice and proof of service. There being no case presented by defendant plaintiff rests, evidence is admitted. The matter is submitted and court rules for the plaintiff. Mr. Rossoff provides the Court with the judgment form. (See judgment for details.) Exhibits are withdrawn and returned. Court adjourns.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-20-2002 Continued To Sep-23-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-23-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter; Lewis Gillian. Plaintiff appeared with counsel. Michael S. Rossoff, Esq., and there being no appearance by the defendant, the court order the matter off the settlement conference calendar and strikes the request for jury demand. Trial date is confirmed.
